summary: Full backend + frontend regression complete for AgroConnect. 21/21 backend pytest assertions passed (auth, listings, posts/comments/likes, messages, users). 11/11 end-to-end UI flows passed: register, login (farmer & buyer), feed (post/like/comment), marketplace (list/category/search/create), profile edit, contact->message, logout, protected-route redirect. No critical issues.

minor.issue: Pydantic ListingIn does not validate that price/quantity are >= 0 (allows negative values). Low priority.
No pagination; .to_list(500) hard cap. Acceptable for current dataset but should paginate at scale.
EmailStr backed by email-validator rejects .test/.example TLDs (RFC2606). Tests must use real-looking TLDs (e.g. @agroconnect.in).

issues: When loading the page for a brand-new user, the 'No posts yet. Be the first to share!' empty-state can briefly flash before the GET /api/posts response renders (no loading skeleton). Cosmetic.

action_items: Optional: add min_value/positive constraints on ListingIn.price and ListingIn.quantity
Optional: add a loading skeleton on Feed/Marketplace while initial API call is in-flight (avoids brief empty-state flash)
Optional: clean up a stray 'x' test listing created during testing (1 leftover row in db.listings)
critical_code_review_comments: CORS: allow_credentials=False with allow_origins=['*'] is fine for Bearer-token auth, but set_auth_cookies() sets cookies with SameSite=None;Secure that the browser will accept but the frontend currently ignores (uses localStorage). The cookie path is dead code; either honour cookies in the frontend or remove set_auth_cookies to avoid confusion.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context to avoid future-version warnings.

Listing search uses unescaped regex from user input (q is passed directly into $regex). Add re.escape(q) before building the Mongo regex to avoid ReDoS and unexpected matches on special chars (e.g. q='(' would 500).
JWT secret is committed in backend/.env. Acceptable for preview, but ensure it is rotated for production.
Feed.jsx 'Posts' quick-stat reads posts.length before fetch resolves; render placeholder or skeleton.
data-testid coverage is excellent across all interactive elements.
test_credentials: Farmer: ravi@agroconnect.in / Farm@123 (verified). Buyer: buyer@agroconnect.in / Buy@1234 (verified). /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not present.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 2 users, 6 listings, 3 posts on startup. Tests created (and cleaned up) several TEST_ records; one stray 'x' listing remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://farmer-hub-29.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth uses Bearer token via localStorage 'ac_token'. Backend also sets httpOnly cookies but frontend ignores them. After successful login the app redirects to '/' (Feed), NOT '/feed'. Email validator rejects .test/.example TLDs - use @agroconnect.in or similar. Marketplace listings API returns category=all as no-filter. When asserting listing counts in UI, wait for selector '[data-testid^="listing-"]' rather than relying on URL change alone (timing).
